about.metaTitle: About bubbleOut: the mission behind the app
about.metaDescription: bubbleOut was born in Montréal with one simple idea: that your urge to go out always finds its people. Our mission, our values, and what's next in Paris.
about.heroSubline: We're the team behind the app. Here's what we're trying to build, and why.
about.missionStatement: That your urge to go out finds its people.
missionBody: bubbleOut is a local social app: spontaneous Events, Clubs that last, and people who meet up in real life around what they love doing.

Your city is full of people who love the same things you do. The Sunday morning run, the drinks that stretch late on a patio. Our job is to get you in the same room. The rest, you handle just fine without us.

We built the app around one conviction: an Event happens once. A Club is what brings you back together. So yes, you can propose a plan in 2 minutes and see who's in. But what makes us proud is what happens after: the group that sets another date, votes on its next outing in the Talks, keeps talking in the Chat. The app fades, the moment stays.
about.valuesTitle: Four things we don't compromise on

values.title: Authenticity
values.body: Verified profiles, real passions, zero façade. You know who you're meeting before you show up.

values.title: Community
values.body: The heart of bubbleOut is the Clubs: groups that live on over time. We measure our success by how often you meet up again.

values.title: Autonomy
values.body: You're the one who creates. Your Event, your Club, your rules: you choose who joins, and what it's all about. We provide the tools, you do the rest.

values.title: Inclusion
values.body: Showing up alone, speaking another language, landing in a city you don't know: everyone starts somewhere. Here, there's a place for you.

storyBody: bubbleOut was born in Montréal. That's where we saw the first Clubs come to life: people running together on Sunday mornings, meeting up for drinks on a patio or a game of werewolf at Parc La Fontaine. That's where we understood we were onto something: strangers who cross paths at an Event and end up meeting again every week.

Now, we're opening Paris. The first Paris Clubs are forming right now, and the people who arrive today set the tone for what the city becomes on bubbleOut. Montréal proved the idea holds. Paris writes the next chapter.
We're a small team, between Montréal and Paris, and we make this app with care.
about.ctaSubline: If all of this speaks to you, the rest happens outside.

security.metaDescription: bubbleOut keeps your privacy safe: biometric verified profile, exact location never shared, active moderation and one-tap blocking. Go out with confidence.
security.heroSubline: Verified profile, private location, active moderation: you go out with confidence, we handle the rest.

features.title: Biometric verified profile
features.body: Every person on bubbleOut completed biometric verification. You know who you're meeting before you show up.

features.title: Your exact location stays private
features.body: Others see a zone, not your address. Nobody knows where you live or work.

features.title: Prohibited content removed
features.body: Our moderation team acts on reports. Content that doesn't belong here disappears fast.

features.title: Block and report in two taps
features.body: Someone makes you uncomfortable? Block them, report them, two taps. The team takes it from there.
features.imgAlt: Screenshot of bubbleOut block and report button

onlineTips.title: Don't share financial information
onlineTips.body: There's no valid reason to ask for money on bubbleOut. If it happens, it's a scam. Report it right away.

onlineTips.title: Take time to get a feel for someone
onlineTips.body: You don't have to share everything upfront. Your address, workplace, daily routine can wait until you trust someone.

onlineTips.title: Avoid messages you might regret
onlineTips.body: What's sent can't be taken back. Get to know someone before going further.

onlineTips.title: Report what feels off
onlineTips.body: Threatening behavior, harassment, inappropriate content: the reporting tools are there for that. We read every report.

irlTips.title: Choose a public place
irlTips.body: Café, bar, park, museum: for a first time, pick busy spots. Avoid private addresses you don't know.

irlTips.title: Let someone know
irlTips.body: A quick text with the location and time to someone close: two seconds and it changes everything. You can share the Event link directly.

irlTips.title: Arrange your own transport
irlTips.body: Come and go on your own terms. You stay in control of when you leave.

irlTips.title: Trust yourself
irlTips.body: If something feels off, leave. You don't need to justify it or stay out of polite obligation.

irlTips.title: Watch what you consume
irlTips.body: Know where your drink comes from, keep an eye on it. Never let a stranger refill your glass.

irlTips.title: Keep your belongings on you
irlTips.body: Phone, wallet, ID: keep them with you, not on the table.

security.ctaSubline: You know the rules. What happens next is outdoors.

faq.metaDescription: Everything you need to know about bubbleOut: Events, Clubs, Talks, Chat, Explore, safety, availability. Find the answer to your question in seconds.
faq.intro: Find answers to the most common questions about bubbleOut here.

items.q: What is bubbleOut?
items.a: bubbleOut is a local social app. You discover Events around you, join Clubs built around your passions, and talk with members in the group Chat before meeting up in real life. No swiping, no feed: just outings and local communities.

items.q: Is bubbleOut a dating app?
items.a: No. bubbleOut is not a dating app. You meet people through what you love doing: sports, music, food, cultural outings... The goal: living moments together, not finding a soulmate.

items.q: Is the app free?
items.a: Yes, the app is free to download and use. A Premium subscription and paid options are available to unlock advanced features.

items.q: Which platforms is bubbleOut available on?
items.a: bubbleOut is available on iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play).

items.q: What is an Event on bubbleOut?
items.a: An Event is an outing proposed by a user: brunch, sport, a night out, an exhibition, a hike... You choose the theme, the place, the date and the capacity. It can be public (visible in Explore) or private (invite only).

items.q: How do I join an Event?
items.a: Find the Event through Explore or the interactive map, then send a request to join. The organizer accepts or declines. Once you're in, you join the Event's group Chat to talk before the outing.

items.q: How do I create an Event?
items.a: In under a minute. You choose the theme, the place, the date, the capacity and the visibility (public or private). Requests to join arrive straight in the app. You accept or decline whoever you want.

items.q: Can I limit the number of people at my Event?
items.a: Yes. You set a maximum capacity when you create it. If it fills up, you can raise it anytime from the Event settings.

items.q: What is a Club on bubbleOut?
items.a: A Club is a local community built around a passion: running, board games, techno, foodies, film... Members meet up regularly through the Club's Events. That's the difference with a one-off Event: a Club lives on over time.

items.q: How do I join a Club?
items.a: Find it in Explore or through a shared link, then send a request to join. The Club admin approves or declines your request.

items.q: How do I create a Club?
items.a: You add a name, a theme, a cover photo and a location. Then you choose whether the Club is public (visible in Explore) or private (invite link only). You're automatically the admin and you manage join requests.

items.q: What are Talks in a Club?
items.a: Talks are internal micro-polls. Members propose outing ideas, everyone votes, and the plans that rise to the top become Events. The group decides what it does.

items.q: How does discovering Events and Clubs work?
items.a: The Explore tab shows Events and Clubs within 100 km around you. Results take your filters into account: date, theme, members' age, gender, lifestyle, values, personality traits. No opaque algorithm: you see exactly why a Club or an Event is suggested to you.

items.q: Can I filter Events and Clubs by theme or date?
items.a: Yes. Advanced filters let you sort by date and theme, but also by member profile (age, gender, lifestyle, values, personality traits). You refine until you find exactly what fits you.

items.q: Is there a map to see Events around me?
items.a: Yes. The interactive map shows you the Events happening near you in real time. You can move around freely and see at a glance what's going on in your neighbourhood or in another area.

items.q: How does Chat work on bubbleOut?
items.a: Every Event has its own group Chat, available as soon as you're in. You can share messages, photos, voice notes and GIFs with everyone, before, during and after the outing.

items.q: Can I message someone privately?
items.a: Yes. Outside the group chats, you can send a private message to any bubbleOut member.

items.q: How does bubbleOut verify profiles?
items.a: bubbleOut requires mandatory profile verification for every account. No unverified profile can use the app's interactive features (joining an Event, a Club, sending a message...). This step makes sure you're interacting with real people.

items.q: Can other members see my exact location?
items.a: No. bubbleOut uses your location to show you the Events and Clubs around you, but your exact location is never shared with other members.

items.q: Which cities is bubbleOut available in?
items.a: bubbleOut is available in Montréal and Paris. More cities are coming soon.

items.q: I don't live in Montréal or Paris. Can I use bubbleOut?
items.a: The app works everywhere, but the community is concentrated in Montréal and Paris for now. If you want to bring bubbleOut to your city, reach out: we're looking for local ambassadors.

faq.ctaBody: Our team usually replies within 24 hours.
